meaning: vt.使有规则,使有秩序,调整,使系统化,使合法化
examples: Cohabiting couples would regularize their unions, they said.
He tried to regularize the management of coal mines.
Can you kindly regularize handling charges of last year, please?
Many before him have done the same, knowing that a weak administration will eventually "regularize" the arrangement.
Switzerland's biggest bank by assets, is also asking German clients to "regularize their positions, " a spokeswoman said Sunday.
